original: Fixed CumQ
Juggernaut
Whizzing past ".concat(e.getCombatPronoun("himher"),", the weapon comes up short, missing!")
\n\nThe makeshift club bashes against "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" "+(pc.shields()>0?"shielded":"unshielded")+" shoulder!
\n\nShe shoots wide, the bolt missing "+e.getCombatName()+" by a mile!
\n\nHer aim true, she wings "+e.getCombatName()+" with a powerful bolt, cackling at her success!
\n\nShe barely misses, only the rush of air catching "+e.getCombatName()+" in the face as it shoots past!
\n\nUnable to dodge it in time, it connects hard with "+g.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" face!

Swaying slightly, "+e.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" lose"+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"":"s")+" "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" balance, then tumble"+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"":"s")+" to the floor awkwardly!
\n\n"+g.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"are":"is")+" tripped!
\n\n"+g.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"are":"is")+" stunned!
\n\nShe misses "+e.getCombatName()+", barely, her cock sailing harmlessly through the air. “Fuck!”
\n\nHer solid mast slaps hard against "+e.getCombatName()+", the weight of it catching you by surprise!
\n\n“Like that, huh, bitch?”
\n\n"+g.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"are":"is")+" disarmed!
"+g.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" barely dodge"+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPLural?"":"s")+" the crackling lash, wincing when it snaps hard against the floor! “Fuck!”
\n\nThe metal lash cracks hard against "+g.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" chest, subjecting "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" to a nasty jolt!
\n\n“Fuck yeah! Wire is the best conductor!”
The sudden shock stuns "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" nerves for a brief moment, breaking "+g.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" balance!
\n\n"+g.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"are":"is")+" tripped!

\n\nThinking fast, "+e.getCombatName()+" swing"+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"s")+" "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" [pc.weaponMain] at the soaring missile, sending it sailing harmlessly over Jezzy’s stunned face!
\n\nThe grenade falls short of hitting "+e.getCombatName()+", landing a foot short, then starts to hiss and release a thick pink cloud!
Lucky for "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+", the the gas is outside!
The gas fills "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" nostrils and mouth before "+e.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" can shield them, sending "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" into a coughing fit!
Simultaneously, you notice your blood starting to heat up, your heart pumping faster!
You watch her eyes go wide as saucers, and a moment later she yanks out the syringe and tosses it unceremoniously to the side. You’re not sure what happened, but it can’t be good!",null,this
